target: Mafi & Naderi (2021), arXiv:2112.02921 — integral closure of M_{3,t}

axiom_lines: 'MafiNaderi_t2.M_subsetneq_closure' does not depend on any axioms
'MafiNaderi_t2.closure_embedded_prime' does not depend on any axioms
'MafiNaderi_t2.M_no_embedded_prime' does not depend on any axioms

reading: Independent kernel verification of Mafi–Naderi's Theorem 1.6 (closure = Veronese cap-sum ideal) and Corollary 1.7 (the integral closure gains an embedded prime (x,y,z) that the Cohen–Macaulay ideal M_{3,t} lacks), for n = 3, via the general monomial-ideal instrument. Agreement with the paper (no erratum). Verification-amplification; no trust surface.
